bot_profile.name: Pingu
bot_profile.greeting: Hello my name is Pingu at your service
bot_profile.welcome_message: I remember everything about you two. Ask me anything - about your chats, memories, inside jokes, or just talk to me. I can also type if you prefer!

timeline.story: It was raining and you were reading a book. He spilled his coffee, you laughed, and the rest is history.
You both ordered pasta and talked for 4 hours. The waiter had to kick you out.

whatsapp_chats.message: I love you more than coffee
Dreamt about our trip to Paris

inside_jokes.name: pineapple incident
inside_jokes.story: That time you ordered pineapple pizza even though you're 'allergic'

stories.title: How We Fell in Love
stories.content: It started with a spilled coffee and ended with forever...

fallback_responses: Tell me more about that, love ❤️
I don't know that yet - want to tell me?
Ask me about your chats, memories, or just say hi!
